title: PINT
description: Pouring IPA for Network Trust - CSH WiFi EAP-TLS enrollment and home RadSec management

nameOverride.description: Override the chart name used in resource names.

fullnameOverride.description: Override the fully qualified resource name.

name.description: ServiceAccount name. Defaults to the full chart name.

envSecret.description: Name of the pre-existing Secret containing PINT_CLIENT_SECRET and PINT_IPA_PASSWORD. Defaults to the full release name.

config.description: Non-sensitive PINT application configuration, rendered as env vars on the Deployment.

serverURL.description: Public base URL of this service (e.g. https://pint.csh.rit.edu). Login and callback URLs are derived from this.

ipaServiceAccount.description: FreeIPA service account DN used to issue certificates.

ipaWirelessCAName.description: FreeIPA CA name for WiFi client certificates.

ipaRadSecCAName.description: FreeIPA CA name for RadSec certificates.

ipaCertProfile.description: Dogtag certificate profile for WiFi client certs.

ipaRadSecClientCertProfile.description: Dogtag certificate profile for RadSec router client certs.

ipaRadSecServerCertProfile.description: Dogtag certificate profile for the FreeRADIUS outer RadSec TLS cert (RadSec CA-issued; verified by routers).

ipaEAPCertProfile.description: Dogtag certificate profile for the FreeRADIUS EAP-TLS server cert (wireless CA-issued; verified by iOS devices via mobileconfig anchor).

ipaSkipTLSVerify.description: Skip TLS verification when connecting to FreeIPA. For development only.

radSecCheckCRL.description: Enable CRL checking in the RadSec TLS listener. Set false to disable.

radSecProxyProtocol.description: Enable PROXY protocol on the RadSec listener. Required when HAProxy fronts FreeRADIUS.

radSecStatusPort.description: Override the FreeRADIUS status server port (default: 18121).

radSecStatusAddr.description: Override the status server address (host:port). Useful in dev when pod IPs are unreachable.

codeSigningCAName.description: FreeIPA CA name for the iOS mobileconfig code signing certificate.

codeSigningCertProfile.description: Dogtag certificate profile for the mobileconfig signing cert.

wifiSSID.description: WiFi SSID embedded in generated device profiles.

radiusServer.description: RadSec server address shown to users (e.g. radius.csh.rit.edu:2083).

secrets.description: Names of the Kubernetes Secrets PINT creates and manages at runtime. All names default to '<fullname>-<suffix>' so multiple releases in the same namespace never collide.

config.description: Combined config secret (clients.json, clients.conf, status-secret, status). Defaults to '<fullname>-config'.

radSecCert.description: Secret storing the FreeRADIUS TLS certificate and key. Defaults to '<fullname>-radsec-server-certificates'.

profileSigningCert.description: Secret storing the iOS mobileconfig signing certificate and key. Defaults to '<fullname>-profile-signing-cert'.

scepRACert.description: Secret storing the SCEP RA certificate and key. Defaults to '<fullname>-scep-ra-cert'.

deviceMap.description: Secret storing the cert serial to device info map. Defaults to '<fullname>-device-map'.

eapCert.description: Secret storing the FreeRADIUS EAP-TLS server cert and key (eap.crt, eap.key). Wireless CA-issued; verified by iOS devices via mobileconfig anchor. Defaults to '<fullname>-eap-server-cert'.

enabled.description: Deploy the PINT pod. Set false to run PINT as a local process instead.

service.description: Kubernetes Service for the PINT web application.

nodePort.description: NodePort number. Only used when service.type is NodePort.

externalTrafficPolicy.description: ExternalTrafficPolicy for NodePort/LoadBalancer services. Use Local to preserve client IPs (required for HAProxy PROXY protocol).

statusServer.description: FreeRADIUS status virtual server for PINT auth statistics.

enabled.description: Enable the FreeRADIUS status virtual server and PINT statistics queries.

clientCIDR.description: Source CIDR allowed to query the status server.

nodePort.description: NodePort for the status server port. Dev only; PINT queries pods directly in production.

enabled.description: Create an OpenShift Route for the PINT service.

host.description: Route hostname. Omit for an auto-assigned hostname.

enabled.description: Create BuildConfigs and wire image-change triggers on the Deployments.

gitRepo.description: Git repository URL for source builds.

gitRef.description: Git branch or tag to build from (e.g. 'dev' or 'main').

webhookSecret.description: Name of the Secret containing the GitHub webhook secret.

manageImageStream.description: Create/own the shared ImageStream objects. Set true in exactly one release (typically prod).

imageStreamName.description: Name of the ImageStream for the pint application image.

freeradiusImageStreamName.description: Name of the ImageStream for the freeradius image.
